| no-bare-except | bare except banned (ruff E722) | global | [ADR-007, ADR-016] | ruff | ok |
| no-deferred-import | function-body imports banned (ruff PLC0415) | project | [ADR-007, ADR-016] | ruff | ok |
| no-lru-cache-none | @lru_cache(maxsize=None) forbidden; use @cache | project | [ADR-016, ADR-017, ADR-019] | semgrep (blocking) | ok |
| no-mocks | unittest.mock / pytest_mock banned; use fakes | global | [ADR-007, ADR-016] | ruff | ok |
| no-relative-imports | relative imports banned (ruff) | global | [ADR-007, ADR-016] | ruff | ok |
| no-stub-see-docstring | "See OtherClass.method." stub docstrings forbidden | project | [ADR-016, ADR-017, ADR-019] | semgrep (blocking) | ok |
| no-sys-stdout-write | sys.stdout.write forbidden; use console/logging | project | [ADR-016, ADR-017, ADR-019] | semgrep (blocking) | ok |
| no-type-ignore | # type: ignore banned (ruff PGH003) | global | [ADR-007, ADR-016] | ruff | ok |
| no-unittest-testcase | class X(TestCase) forbidden; use pytest functions | project | [ADR-016, ADR-017, ADR-019] | semgrep (blocking) | ok |
| pyright | static type check (pyright strict) | project | [ADR-008, ADR-012] | pyright | ok |
| pytest | full test suite must pass | project | [ADR-013] | pytest | ok |

## Agent-Enforced Rules

Rules enforced by agent adherence to CLAUDE.md (14):

<!-- generated:agent-rules -- do not hand-edit; regenerated by /primer reconcile and /primer sync -->
| Rule | Description | Scope | ADR | Tool |
|------|-------------|-------|-----|------|
| 100% line coverage target | 100% line coverage target | global | [ADR-009] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| CalVer versioning (YYYY.0M.PATCH) | CalVer versioning (YYYY.0M.PATCH) | global | [ADR-004] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Explicit __all__ in every module | Explicit __all__ in every module | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| File headers on new Python files | File headers on new Python files | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Google-style docstrings on public API | Google-style docstrings on public API | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Layer dependency order | Layer dependency order | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Pydantic frozen+strict+extra=forbid | Pydantic frozen+strict+extra=forbid | global | [ADR-021] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Secrets in OS keychain only | Secrets in OS keychain only | global | [ADR-019] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| Tests assert behavior, not side effects | Tests assert behavior, not side effects | global | [ADR-009] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| UTC-aware datetimes only | UTC-aware datetimes only | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| logging, never print() in library code | logging, never print() in library code | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| match/case enum dispatch with case _ default | match/case enum dispatch with case _ default | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| slots=True on structured dataclasses | slots=True on structured dataclasses | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
| test_<function>_<scenario> naming | test_<function>_<scenario> naming | global | [no ADR] | agent (CLAUDE.md) |
<!-- /generated:agent-rules -->
